Jedi: A member of the Jedi Order, trained in the ways of the Force.
Sith: A practitioner of the dark side of the Force.
Droid: A mechanical being capable of independent action.
Clone: A soldier grown from a genetic template, typically Jango Fett.
Force User: A character who can wield the power of the Force.
Aggressive: This unit gains bonuses when attacking without restraint.
Cunning: This unit can exploit enemy weaknesses with precision.
Guardian: This unit is skilled at protecting allies.
Leader: This unit provides bonuses to nearby friendly units.
Bounty Hunter: A mercenary who captures or eliminates targets for profit.
Mandalorian: A warrior from Mandalore, known for their distinctive armor.
